description_long: This sports center is a modern, two-story building with a flat roof and a combination of glass and concrete facades. The structure features large floor-to-ceiling windows on the ground floor, providing ample natural light and visibility into the interior spaces. There are multiple outdoor terraces and balconies, including a rooftop green area and a spacious wooden deck with a swimming pool and lounge seating. The building is surrounded by minimal landscaping, including a few trees and paved walkways. A prominent staircase leads to the upper level, and there is a covered parking area beneath part of the structure. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story sports center with extensive glass facades, rooftop terraces, a pool deck, and minimalist landscaping. The building features clean lines, open spaces, and a contemporary design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass facade, rooftop green area, and covered parking beneath the upper floor.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor pool, wooden deck, and a prominent staircase leading to the upper level.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool area, extensive deck space, and large windows along the back of the building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, lounge area, and the building's multiple terraces and balconies.
attribute_entrance_type: One main entrance with double glass doors, located beneath the upper floor and adjacent to the parking area.
attribute_roof_structure: Flat roof with a green rooftop area and multiple terraces; constructed from concrete and glass with metal railings.
attribute_window_arrangement: Large floor-to-ceiling windows on the ground floor, with additional horizontal window bands and glass balcony railings; windows are symmetrically aligned.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary Modernist with clean lines, flat roofs, and extensive use of glass and open spaces.
